title: duhaldea lanuginosa
intro: Duhaldea lanuginosa, also known as the hairy duhaldea or hairy duhaldea root, is a plant species native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia, characterized by its hairy stems and leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties that help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Duhaldea lanuginosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and treat gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Duhaldea lanuginosa often involve extracting its roots and leaves to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
